**Regime: Risk-premium mode — yield rises don't support FX; vol-driven carry crowding threatens multi-currency unwind.**

**Inflection currencies:**

- **GBP short**: Rich valuation (+1.3), softening fundamentals (–0.28), and policy boxed in (feasibility –1.5 on stagflation trap). Carry crowded at 95th percentile on real-yield premium that won't survive a vol spike. Classic unwind candidate.
- **AUD short**: Stretched (+1.7) on valuation alone; fundamentals deteriorating (–0.33), carry at 90th percentile. Yield stress regime (–0.39 correlation) means RBA policy support is muted.
- **JPY long**: Cheap (–0.68), improving fundamentals (+0.44), mean-reversion setup despite weak nominal correlation to USD. Real-yield regime depressed (mult –0.40) but fundamental turn is broad across growth, inflation, external.

**Carry standout:** EUR—policy pillar (+1.2) is doing all the work; other pillars neutral. Carry crowded (87th percentile) on narrow policy tailwind; fragile if ECB rhetoric shifts or vol spikes.

**Prior move:** No prior snapshot provided.
